title: Gemma 4: AI Frontier Now ON YOUR LOCAL DEVICE! #shorts
summary: Gemma 4 is an open-weight AI model that runs directly on local hardware without requiring cloud processing. It brings frontier-level AI capabilities to consumer devices.
